title: Page request from the Complete works book
display_title: Page request from the Complete works book
wikitext:
[]: Page request from the Complete works book             Quote Post by KaaVI » Thu Sep 01, 2011 3:39 am I wanted to Ask somebody who ownd the book if they can take a scan or a photograph of Kaworu's 2.0 plugsuit art from the Complete works book please. I mainly need it from the different angles and the line art is the best refrence one can have for cosplay. I would really appreciate it!

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu Sep 01, 2011 9:17 am Plugsuit cosplay is a doomed venture....but if you're willing to try anyway
